name: review-code
description: Use when reviewing a local branch diff or a GitHub PR. Produces a local Markdown report with confidence-ranked findings and permalinks. Never posts to GitHub, never mutates files.

interface.shortDescription: Use when reviewing a local branch diff or a GitHub PR. Produces a local Markdown report with confidence-ranked findings
interface.longDescription: Use when reviewing a local branch diff or a GitHub PR. Produces a local Markdown report with confidence-ranked findings and permalinks. Never posts to GitHub, never mutates files.
